Title: [Bulk Assignments] Validate User can see the number of selected records

Step Action: Navigate to and select the vertical ellipses then select Bulk Assignments
Step Expected: The Bulk Assignments list page is displayed

Step Action: Select Query Type, Location Assignment Type and Location using the dropdown list

Step Expected: Search results displayed on Bulk Assignments list page

Step Action: Select 20 in the page counter at the bottom of the page
Select Check box at the Left corner on the Header to select all the records on the current page
Step Expected: All records on the current page marked as selected

Step Action: Validate the Message at the top bar displays as '20 Records selected'
Select three records using Check boxes
Step Expected: Only those three records marked as selected

Step Action: Validate the Message at the top bar displays as 'Three records selected'
Validate records get unselected when moving to different page

Step Expected: User is logged out of the system
